mapper.insert: insert into user (openid, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time) values (#{openid}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, IFNULL(SUM(id), 0) AS turnover FROM user
AND create_time > CONCAT(#{begin}, ' 00:00:00') AND create_time < CONCAT(#{end}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
